title: CCTech
body:
This is a mod that adds more storage types to CC:Tweaked. These storage types are unmanaged, meaning you as the end user have the freedom to decide your data structure on each. Included is a program `tape`, that's loaded into rom at `/rom/programs/`, which will allow you to save/load files from tape in a generic format. The file is commented, and may be a good place to start if you decide you'd like to implement something of your own.

Currently Implemented Features:
* Cassettes
* Reel To Reels

For more information, such as a full list of features and information about the Lua API see the github wiki.
